title: Microfibre Spray Mops for Floors Cleaning, 360 Degree Rotating Floor Mop Flat Dry Wet Mop with Spray Funcation, with 3 Washable Replacement Pads & 1 Bottle 360ML for Home Kitchen Cleaning
features: Make Cleaning Efficient and Easy- 360ML Large Refillable Water Tank can let you leave the traditional heavy, messy bucket alone, you can fill it with your favorite cleaner, add hot water. Simply press the trigger on the handle, it converts water evenly into water mist, then it will clean your room thoroughly , which not only saves your time and effort but also saves water resources, it makes mopping efficiency with minimize efforts than the regular mop.

Improved Professional Versatile Spray Mop-Harmless to floor, Our microfiber spray mop with light weight and made by high quality aluminum, its easy and simple for cleaning hardwood floor, laminate wood floor, ceramic tiles and etc. No bending, no bucket, just need press the spray trigger of floor mop then you can get the cold water mist you need.

3 High Absorbent & Reusable Microfiber Moppads-Mop pads have millions of microscopic fibers, which is super absorbent and can effectively grab debris, dust, and hair. The pad absorbs the water quickly, floor dries in minutes and there is no watermarks/shadows on the floor after cleaning. It comes with 3 microfiber pads, which is machine washable and reusable, no need to constantly buying the disposable cleaning pads anymore.

Simple and Practical Floor Mop-the dry wet mop head can rotate 360 degrees, making floor cleaning even more hassle-free and easy to control. Our microfiber mop can easily be maneuvered into all corners and hard-to-reach areas. Remove dust from under your sofa, bed, around table legs, or any other tight spot, and it works well on many surfaces, even the most stubborn dirt can be dealt with quickly and easily.

Addtional Scraper - The multifunctional scraper is used to squeeze water away from the mop pads and to remove dirt and stains on floor/tile, the side of the comb shape can remove the hair on the floor mop pads, which make the cleaning job much easier.

Satisfaction Guarantee- We are confident in the quality of our mop, and we offer a satisfaction guarantee to back it up. If you are not completelzy satisfied with your purchase, simply return it to us within 30 days for a full refund or exchange.

Warm Tips: 1: During the production stage all spray mops are filled with water to test the spray function, so it is normal if there is some residual water in the bottle. 2: Please do not add boiling water, strong acids, or alkaline cleaners to the bottle to avoid damaging the spray system. 3: Before using thick cleaning solutions, please dilute them completely with water. 4: Please clean the water bottle and the spray nozzle of the spray mop after use.
